イベントID(もしくは名称) = 1

Oh, hey, isn't that \n[1]? You finally came back? How've you been? Huh, just you? What
happened to Mana-chan?

...What, Mana-chan hasn't come back!? That's a shame... That girl might've gotten her
energy back if she'd come to our bath!

Just the other day, we had some renovation work done on our bathhouse... And guess
what, we now have an open-air bath! If only Mana-chan, who loves baths, were here...
she'd be so happy!

Well, even if it's just you, \n[1], go take a bath! Wash away the fatigue of your
adventure!

What's up? Huh? Why is it mixed bathing? Well, it was at the request of the men who
helped with the construction! There's no way we could go against the village chief
and the others!

Well, but the mixed bathing was only popular at first... The guys got bored right
away because only old hags were coming in, they said it was boring!
Huh? What's up, \n[1]? What? You want a job? Hmm, let's see...

Well then, maybe I'll have you clean the bathhouse. Oh, of course the men's bath and
the mixed bathing area? It's pretty spacious just there, so I think it'll be tough...

Ah, you'll do it? That's a huge help~! I always struggle with it alone! Alright then,
\n[1]! I'm counting on you!

You set about cleaning the men's bath and mixed bathing area... Perhaps due to the
considerable size, grime that wasn't fully removed during regular cleaning stands
out... This looks like it'll be worth the effort to clean...
You must be tired. Are you okay, \n[1]? Here, your allowance for today!

What's up, you're here to clean again? Hmm, well, I'll take you up on that. Since
you're here, make sure to get every nook and cranny nice and clean, okay?
Thanks, \n[1]! Alright, I'm counting on you!

Once again, I set about cleaning the men's bath and the mixed bathing area... I
carefully cleaned every corner of the bathhouse, even the grime that wasn't fully
removed during the last job.........

Thanks, \n[1]! It's so clean it reminds me of when it was newly built! Here! This is
your allowance!

\n[1]...? Don't you have anything else to do? If you're still offering to help, well,
I'd appreciate it... but don't expect much of a reward, okay?

Once again, I started cleaning the men's bath and the mixed bathing area. Hmm,
honestly, there's nothing left to do. I'll just clean up a bit...

Thanks, \n[1]! I'd like to reward your hard work too, but... we're not exactly rolling
in money here, so please accept this much!
// 進行度2,1,2　雲の日夜　初回

Ah, \n[1]! By any chance, are you free right now? If you are, I'd like you to help me
clean the bath.
-----その場のキャラの吹き出しを消す---------
-----1/6天気をフェードイン前に適応したいとき
もしかしたら遠景バグって二重に表示されるかも？
現在天候のコモンイベント実行
----------------フラッシュでフェード解除
テンプレテキスト代入
対象文字パラメータ = bust

I see... So you can't! Well, no choice then, I'll just have to do my best! It's
fine... I've managed on my own until now, so I'll be okay...!
Hmm, she seems pretty busy... Should I do it for her instead?
// 進行度2,1,2　雲の日夜　二回目以降
Oh, \n[1], you came again? Well then, come on in right away.

Helped clean the bathhouse... ...Elly didn't come to the mixed bath today.
Just...Dario was there alone, eagerly waiting for a chance encounter.
skit pose ダリオ t bath 6

Haaah, it's a mixed bath for crying out loud... Why the hell are you the only one
here, dammit...! Where the hell did Elly go...?

Well...Elly was so angry last time. She probably won't come out of the women's bath
anymore.

\SE[9]What!? Damn, shit...did I go too far...!? In that case, I've got no choice but to
wait for some young female traveler to show up...!\SE[3]

Good grief...Dario, same as always...... Ever since he became an adult, all he talks
about is girls. That's exactly why Mana and Elly dislike him...

Ignoring the sulking Dario, I diligently finished the work... I managed to polish the
bathhouse until it sparkled. Thanks to the low number of customers, cleaning was
easy...

parameters.message: エリィのご飯のお陰で頑張れた･･･！

parameters: メッセージ = エリィのご飯のお陰で頑張れた･･･！

Wow, \n[1]! Thanks to you, it's gotten really clean! Here! Your allowance! I put in a
little extra!
You must be tired. Are you okay, \n[1]? Here, your allowance for today!
...You've got it rough too, \n[1]. I can't really do anything about it, though.

Right now, there's a troublesome customer in the mixed bath... I think you'd better
not go near it.
I wonder what's going on...? Did something happen in the mixed bath.........
Huh, \n[1]...? What is it, at a time like this...

...Hmm, well........... Actually, it's...just forget about your part-time job today.
You're free to go bathe...but don't go near the mixed bath.

It's better for your health if you don't ask... Hah...good grief, the men in this
village, every last one of them.........

...You know, if you've got talent as an adventurer, you should just leave this
village and go somewhere else. Unlike us, you can go anywhere.
\n[1]... I appreciate you coming to help, but... I don't really need it right now...

...Elly must be doing something naughty in the mixed bath. The old lady is being
considerate, making sure I'm not there... I appreciate the thought...
